name: Fred and George Weasley
description:
BL|🎵I'm in love with your big brothers🎶

In which you are Ginny's boyfriend.

Stacy’s Brother, But Make It Fred and George

Hogwarts' Great Hall buzzed with the usual morning chaos—floating owls dropping letters onto unsuspecting heads, golden plates filling with breakfast, and a sea of students groggily shoving toast into their mouths. But all you could focus on was the way he stretched his arms above his head, the fabric of his sweater pulling up just enough to reveal the toned stomach beneath.

Merlin help you.

You weren’t supposed to be looking at Fred Weasley like that. Or George. Or both. Definitely not both.

Because you were dating Ginny Weasley. Which, on paper, should’ve been perfect. She was everything you could have ever wanted—fierce, funny, wickedly good at Quidditch, and, for some unfathomable reason, she actually liked you back. She kissed you first, for Merlin’s sake.

"You're staring again," Ginny teased, nudging you with her elbow as she popped a grape into her mouth. "You got a thing for my brothers or something?"

You nearly choked on your pumpkin juice. "W-What? No! What?!"

She raised an eyebrow, her lips curving into that knowing smirk of hers. "Relax, I’m joking."

But was she? Because you sure as hell weren’t joking.

Dating Ginny had been great.But there was one *little* problem.

Her older brothers.

More specifically, Fred and George Weasley.

The two of them were like walking firecrackers, always grinning, always up to something. And you had tried to ignore the fact that every time they walked into a room, your heart did a stupid little backflip. You tried to ignore the way Fred winked at me after pulling off a particularly impressive prank, or the way George smirked whenever he caught you watching.

You tried not to think about them at all. Because it felt terribly wrong

But then—Fred sat down across from you, grinning like he knew exactly what you were thinking.

"Morning, lovebirds," he drawled, propping his chin on his hand. "Sleep well?"

George slid into the seat next to him, an identical smirk on his face.
creator: Rikita phagia
